category_sources: Official Yubico docs describe YubiKey Manager (ykman) CLI commands and usage.
source_facts.description says ykman is a tool for managing YubiKey configuration.
display_name_sources: Official Yubico docs title is YubiKey Manager (ykman) CLI User Guide.
docs_sources: Official developers.yubico.com/yubikey-manager page documents development and source repository details.
Official docs.yubico.com ykman guide documents installation and CLI commands.
repo_sources: Official GitHub result identifies Yubico/yubikey-manager as the Python library and command-line tool for configuring YubiKeys.
Official Yubico development page gives git clone https://github.com/Yubico/yubikey-manager.git and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: Official Yubico ykman guide documents CLI usage for YubiKey Manager.
